## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test-only

## Verification

List exact commands executed locally.

```bash
cargo check
cargo test --all
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated docs where needed.
- [ ] I kept the change scoped and backward-safe.
